subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to retrieve AWS contracted commit levels (RIs, Savings Plans) and actual monthly/quarterly spend from cost management warehouse, grouped by service and commitment type

Reconcile contracted commitments against actual spend to calculate utilization percentages, identify overcommitted and underutilized services, and classify commitment posture (over-provisioned, optimal, under-provisioned)

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen at mid-tier because the query requires joining multiple cost tables (commitments, actual spend), filtering by time periods, and aggregating across service lines and commitment types—straightforward multi-table join but not complex window functions. (2) cross_recon at mid-tier to reconcile the two datasets (contracted vs actual), calculate utilization metrics, and classify posture—moderate complexity reconciliation without multi-source heterogeneity. No policy_action added because posture classification is analytical/descriptive, not a governance policy evaluation. No multitool_plan needed; the work is contained within SQL and reconciliation agents.

output.sql: SELECT cf.publisher, cf.product AS service, cf.event_type AS commitment_type, DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date) AS spend_month, EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM cf.event_date) AS spend_quarter, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM cf.event_date) AS spend_year, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reserved_instance', 'savings_plan', 'committed_use', 'RI', 'SP', 'commit') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS contracted_commit_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type NOT IN ('reserved_instance', 'savings_plan', 'committed_use', 'RI', 'SP', 'commit') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS on_demand_spend, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS total_spend, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.license_id) AS license_count, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reserved_instance', 'savings_plan', 'committed_use', 'RI', 'SP', 'commit') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type NOT IN ('reserved_instance', 'savings_plan', 'committed_use', 'RI', 'SP', 'commit') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS commit_vs_ondemand_delta, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reserved_instance', 'savings_plan', 'committed_use', 'RI', 'SP', 'commit') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(cf.amount_usd), 0), 2) AS commit_coverage_pct FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher ILIKE '%AWS%' OR cf.publisher ILIKE '%Amazon%' GROUP BY cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_type, DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date), EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM cf.event_date), EXTRACT(YEAR FROM cf.event_date) ORDER BY spend_year DESC, spend_quarter DESC, spend_month DESC, total_spend DESC
